definitions.usage_example: Additionally, we need to buy milk.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Additionally, we need to buy milk.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Como un factor o razón extra; además.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As an extra factor or reason; in addition.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Similarmente / Del mismo modo]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The sisters dress similarly.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: De una manera similar.]

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: De lo contrario / Si no]
definitions.usage_example: Study hard, otherwise you will fail.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Study hard, otherwise you will fail.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar la consecuencia si no se cumple una condición.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to state the consequence if a condition is not met.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: De otra manera / Diferente]
definitions.usage_example: He is quiet, but she is otherwise.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is quiet, but she is otherwise.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: De una manera diferente; diferentemente.]

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Sin embargo / No obstante (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: It was cold. Nevertheless, he went swimming.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It was cold. Nevertheless, he went swimming.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A pesar de eso; no obstante (una versión muy formal de 'however').]
definitions.usage_context_es: In spite of that; nonetheless (a very formal version of 'however').

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Sin embargo / No obstante (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: The results are bad. Nonetheless, we must continue.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The results are bad. Nonetheless, we must continue.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A pesar de eso; sin embargo (también muy formal).]
definitions.usage_context_es: In spite of that; nevertheless (also very formal).

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Por lo tanto / Por consiguiente (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Por esa razón; consecuentemente (usado en habla o escritura formal).]
definitions.usage_context_es: For that reason; consequently (used in formal speech or writing).
